options.content:
## Hook Health Dashboard

This dashboard will display hook execution metrics once the API server supports the `hook_health` query target.

**Planned panels:**
- Hook success/failure rates (bar chart)
- Average execution duration by hook (table)
- Error log (table with timestamp, hook, error message)
- Duration trend over time (time-series)

**Data source:** Hook health JSONL is currently written to the plugin's local `logs/hook-health.jsonl`. A future update will expose this through the API server.
